类 JAXRSAnnotations

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.JAXRSAnnotations
@Deprecated public final class JAXRSAnnotations extends Object

Java EE has been renamed to Jakarta EE, an upgrade is recommended.
